$comment: Vercel deployment config. Two jobs: (1) build the React app in frontend/ and serve its dist folder as the static site, (2) route requests correctly. Rewrites are checked in order AFTER real files: anything under /api/* goes to the Python serverless function (api/index.py, our Flask app - Flask then matches the full path like /api/process). Everything else falls back to index.html, which is required for a React Router SPA: without it, refreshing the browser on /view would 404 because no file called 'view' exists on the server.
buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
